features: CHEMICAL FREE: Nuage Reuseable Makeup cloth only requires water to help remove all types of cosmetics with ease. Cosmetics without chemicals! Suitable for sensitive skin
DAILY USE: Clean skin quickly and easily daily at home or on holiday. Super soft durable cleansing cloths in three colours
FACE AND EYES: The Nuage Reuseable Makeup cloth is perfect to use on the whole face and it will remove cosmetic makeup, eye make up and mascara
PERFECT FOR TRAVEL: Reduce beauty travel contents, leave bottles of cleansers at home, travel with the 3 pack of Nuage Reuseable Makeup cloths and add water to use each time
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Reuseable, 3 cloths mixed colour
description: Nuage Reuseable Makeup cloths require only water to help remove all types of cosmetics with ease. Clean skin quickly and easily daily at home or on holiday. Super soft durable cleansing cloth lifts away makeup, oil and daily pollutants. Cosmetics without chemicals! Suitable for sensitive skin. Reuseable, 3 cloths mixed colour
